import pytest
from your_module import slugify  # Replace 'your_module' with actual module name


class TestSlugify:
    """Test cases for the slugify function."""
    
    # Happy path tests
    def test_basic_text_conversion(self):
        """Test basic text to slug conversion."""
        assert slugify("Hello World") == "hello-world"
    
    def test_text_with_spaces(self):
        """Test text with multiple spaces."""
        assert slugify("Hello   World   Test") == "hello-world-test"
    
    def test_text_with_underscores(self):
        """Test text with underscores."""
        assert slugify("hello_world_test") == "hello-world-test"
    
    def test_text_with_mixed_case(self):
        """Test text with mixed case."""
        assert slugify("Hello WORLD Test") == "hello-world-test"
    
    def test_text_with_numbers(self):
        """Test text with numbers."""
        assert slugify("Hello World 123") == "hello-world-123"
    
    def test_text_with_hyphens(self):
        """Test text with existing hyphens."""
        assert slugify("hello-world-test") == "hello-world-test"
    
    def test_alphanumeric_text(self):
        """Test alphanumeric text."""
        assert slugify("Test123ABC") == "test123abc"
    
    # Edge cases
    def test_empty_string(self):
        """Test empty string input."""
        assert slugify("") == ""
    
    def test_whitespace_only(self):
        """Test string with only whitespace."""
        assert slugify("   ") == ""
        assert slugify("\t\n  ") == ""
    
    def test_single_character(self):
        """Test single character input."""
        assert slugify("a") == "a"
        assert slugify("A") == "a"
        assert slugify("1") == "1"
    
    def test_only_special_characters(self):
        """Test string with only special characters."""
        assert slugify("!@#$%^&*()") == ""
        assert slugify(".,;:\"'") == ""
    
    def test_leading_trailing_spaces(self):
        """Test text with leading and trailing spaces."""
        assert slugify("  hello world  ") == "hello-world"
    
    def test_leading_trailing_hyphens_after_processing(self):
        """Test text that results in leading/trailing hyphens."""
        assert slugify("-hello world-") == "hello-world"
        assert slugify("--hello--world--") == "hello-world"
    
    def test_multiple_consecutive_hyphens(self):
        """Test text that creates multiple consecutive hyphens."""
        assert slugify("hello---world") == "hello-world"
        assert slugify("hello     world") == "hello-world"
    
    def test_mixed_separators(self):
        """Test text with mixed separators (spaces, underscores, hyphens)."""
        assert slugify("hello_world test-case") == "hello-world-test-case"
        assert slugify("hello___world   test") == "hello-world-test"
    
    def test_unicode_letters_and_numbers(self):
        """Test with unicode letters and numbers that should be preserved."""
        assert slugify("café123") == "café123"
        assert slugify("naïve approach") == "naïve-approach"
    
    def test_special_characters_removal(self):
        """Test removal of various special characters."""
        assert slugify("hello@world.com") == "helloworldcom"
        assert slugify("price: $19.99!") == "price-1999"
        assert slugify("100% success rate") == "100-success-rate"
